home_bio: I love building clean, thoughtful web experiences, and I'm always up for learning something new — lately that's been AI engineering.
works_description: Just some things I've built or worked on.
about_description: I'm a frontend engineer who enjoys building thoughtful web experiences. I'm always open to trying new things, and right now I'm learning more about AI engineering.
about_bio: I'm a Software Engineer III at Age of Learning in Glendale, California. For over a decade I've been building front-end web and mobile experiences for kids and families — from ABCmouse and ReadingIQ to Flutter apps like My Music Academy: Playful Piano, along with in-house tools that help teams create and organize content. I like picking up new things along the way, and lately I've been diving into AI engineering.
blog_description: Thoughts on development, tools, and learning.
